summary: Specified the local Site Telemetry publisher/puller tool contract, including command shapes, publish/pull plan artifacts, run-result separation for publication intent, transport, local admission, and remote finalization, plus dry-run, credential-reference, no-secret-logging, error, and authority-boundary requirements.
residuals: CLI wrappers or scripts that emit these artifacts remain later implementation work.
Secret resolver integration and scheduler posture remain later work.
A live receiving Site runtime proof remains later work beyond the fixture proof.
